title: Kya Meri Sonam Gupta Bewafa Hai
original_title: क्या मेरी सोनम गुप्ता बेवफा है?
overview: Sintoo, a dejected lover, pens down his feelings on a currency note which goes viral and triggers a chain of hilarious events. Will he overcome the heartbreak and find closure?
